_note: Probed and overwritten by .claude/hooks/session-start.py on each session start. This file is checked in as a documented stub so skills/agents can rely on its presence; the session-start hook replaces it with real values. Skills MUST read this file (not the PATH directly) to decide whether Codex / Gemini are available — see .claude/rules/agent-routing.md §'Fallback policy'.
